summary: 6-Item UI Cleanup Pack - All features verified and working. Fixed route ordering issue in server.py where admin_facade_router was being shadowed by admin_router. Backend: 34/34 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified via Playwright.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed router ordering: admin_facade_router now included BEFORE admin_router to prevent /orders/list being caught by /orders/{order_id}
context_for_next_testing_agent: 6-Item UI Cleanup Pack fully tested and verified. All features working: 1) Customer invoice wording (Payment Under Review when proof submitted), 2) Customer invoice table enrichment (Date, Invoice No, Type, Amount, Payer Name, Payment Status), 3) Admin orders table/drawer cleanup (no Awaiting Release tab, enriched 7-section drawer), 4) Admin invoice page enrichment (Date, Invoice No, Customer, Type, Amount, Payer Name, Payment Status, Invoice Status, Linked Ref - no action column), 5) Sign out moved to top-right profile dropdown for all layouts, 6) Vendor order privacy (no customer identity, base price shown, status controls in drawer). Legacy /partner/fulfillment route redirects to /partner/orders.

customer_invoice_wording.details: Payment Under Review shown when proof submitted, Awaiting Payment shown when no proof, Paid in Full shown for paid invoices

customer_invoice_table_columns.details: Table has columns: Date, Invoice No, Type, Amount, Payer Name, Payment Status

admin_orders_tabs.details: Tabs: All Orders, New, Assigned, In Progress, Completed. NO Awaiting Release tab.

admin_orders_table_columns.details: Table has columns: Date, Order #, Customer, Source, Total, Payment, Fulfillment, Assigned Sales, Assigned Vendor

admin_order_drawer_7_sections.details: Drawer has 7 sections: Order Summary, Customer, Assignment, Payment, Fulfillment, Timeline, Admin Actions

admin_invoice_table_columns.details: Table has columns: Date, Invoice No, Customer, Type, Amount, Payer Name, Payment Status, Invoice Status, Linked Ref. NO Action column.

sign_out_in_profile_dropdown.details: Sign Out button is in top-right profile dropdown for Admin, Customer, and Partner layouts. NOT in sidebar bottom.

vendor_orders_privacy.details: Vendor orders table does NOT show customer name. Shows: Date, Vendor Order No, Source Type, Base Price, Status, Priority

vendor_drawer_no_customer_identity.details: Vendor drawer shows Order Summary, Konekt Sales Contact, Work Details, Timeline, Actions. NO customer identity block.

bug_fix_applied.issue: Route ordering conflict in server.py - /api/admin/orders/list was being caught by /api/admin/orders/{order_id}
bug_fix_applied.fix: Moved admin_facade_router include BEFORE admin_router in server.py
